%% This is file `config.tex', Version 1.6
%%

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% ********** EDITORS ONLY **********
% Do NOT edit anything in this block.

%% Rights management information. Should your paper be accepted for publication, this information will be completed by the editorial office.
\setcopyright{cdr}
%copyright options are cdr, usgov, usgovmixed
\copyrightyear{2026}
\cdrJournal{cdr}
\cdrYear{YEAR}
\cdrVolume{XX}
\cdrNumber{XX}
\cdrArticle{1}
% article order in the issue
\cdrMonth{1}
% publication month
\cdrDOI{10.55682/cdr/XXXX-XXXX}
% the DOI is added to a paper once 
\startPage{1}

% This customizes the About the Author section
\authorImage{example-author}
% image size must be 
\biographySectionTitle{ABOUT THE AUTHORS}
% Change to plural form for multiple authors

%% Publication timeline. This information will be filled in by the editorial office. 
\received{Day Month Year}
\received[Revised]{Day Month Year}
\received[Accepted]{Day Month Year}

% EDITOR CHECKLIST
% Checking Submission Type
% References in CMOS
% Copy-editing
% Table and Figures Captions and Ref
% Authors' names and affiliations
% Corresponding author
% short author command
% Short title command
% Authors have confirmed sequence
% Do authors want acknowledgments?
% If known, adding year/vol/issue
% Adding publication timeline
% Authors' final approval
% Authors' signed agreement
% Adding DOI 
% Adding starting page number
